title: .NET Backend Engineer
responsibilities: develop and maintain .NET services; integrate databases and internal systems; improve code quality, observability, and deployment flow
requirements_text: We are looking for a junior specialist with hands-on experience in c#, .net, asp.net core, sql server, entity framework. Strong communication and delivery ownership are expected.
benefits: Flexible schedule, paid vacation, learning budget, mentorship, and access to modern tooling.
summary: LaunchPoint is hiring a junior .net backend engineer to support building enterprise backend systems and internal business applications.
raw_text: Vacancy V072: .NET Backend Engineer at LaunchPoint. Location: Dnipro. Employment: contract. Required experience: 1.9 years. Required skills: c#, .net, asp.net core, sql server, entity framework, azure, docker, microservices. Optional skills: clean architecture, ci/cd, gRPC. Responsibilities: develop and maintain .NET services; integrate databases and internal systems; improve code quality, observability, and deployment flow.
